---
title: "World Bank Pink Sheet Indices"
format: html

execute:
  enabled: true
---

This site tracks the World Bank 'Pink Sheet' monthly indices of a small set of commodity groups that are refreshed by the repository's automated R pipeline and published as a Quarto website.

_Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")_

![](assets/plots/pink_sheet_indices.png){fig-alt="Time-series plot of the Energy, Grains, Oils and Meals, and Fertilizers indices."}
